{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Endross serpent
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|An [[Endross serpent]] appears in a flash of lightning.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
